subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise appeareth in the form of servants who cry out in the wilderness of longing: "O Thou God of the unseen and the seen!" [3.5s]... ...In these days the stay in the True House of Haram-i-Athar (the Purest Wife), upon her be all glory and loftiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر الحمد علی هیئه من العباد ینادی فی بریه الاشتیاق یا اله الغیب و الشهود و
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @business; financial; property matters, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
